---
title: "Yixin Cao"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:yixincao615@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/yixin-cao-874bb3294
---

Welcome to my website!

## About Me
I am Yixin Cao, a Business Analytics student at the University of California, San Diego (UCSD). I am interested in data analysis and problem solving, and I enjoy using quantitative methods to turn raw data into meaningful business insights.

## Skills & Experience
I have experience working with Python, SQL, Excel, and data visualization tools. My academic projects include exploratory data analysis, predictive modeling, and real-world business applications.

## Interests
I am particularly interested in customer analytics, forecasting, and data-driven decision making.

## Current Focus
I am currently working on projects that combine analytics with practical business use cases.
